channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Sean 'Diddy' Combs' sex trafficking trial set for May
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — A May 5 trial date was set Thursday in Sean “Diddy” Combs'sex trafficking case, and a prosecutor argued that the jailed hip-hop mogul's lawyers were trying to exclude a “damning piece of evidence” by claiming it was leaked by the government. Assistant U.S.
item.dc:creator: LARRY NEUMEISTER and MICHAEL R. SISAK, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Here’s how to qualify for FEMA aid — including the $750 payment
item.description: That $750 has been mischaracterized by several high-profile politicians, including former President Donald Trump.
item.dc:creator: Sean Noone, WFLA, NBC

item.title: A federal judge rejects a call to reopen voter registration in Georgia after Hurricane Helene
item.description: ATLANTA (AP) — A federal judge said Thursday that she won't order the presidential battleground state of Georgia to reopen voter registration for November’s elections despite recent disruptions to registration caused by Hurricane Helene. U.S.
item.dc:creator: JEFF AMY, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Prosecutors reviewing 'new evidence' in Marilyn Manson sexual abuse probe
item.description: The sex crimes division of the Los Angeles County District Attorney’s Office is reviewing new leads and evidence in the investigation into shock-rocker Marilyn Manson, who has been accused by multiple women, including “Westworld” actor Evan Rachel Wood, of sexual abuse, officials announced Wednesday
item.dc:creator: Josh DuBose, Fox 5

item.title: Chicago man charged with assaulting two officers during protests of Netanyahu address to Congress
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — An Illinois man was arrested Thursday on charges that he attacked two police officers during protests in Washington, D.C., against Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu’s address to Congress in July.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Ethel Kennedy, social activist and wife of Robert F. Kennedy, has died
item.description: BOSTON, Mass. (AP) — Ethel Kennedy, the wife of Sen. Robert F. Kennedy, who raised their 11 children after he was assassinated and remained dedicated to social causes and the family’s legacy for decades thereafter, died on Thursday, her family said. She was 96.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL CASEY and STEVE LeBLANC, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Florida deputies rescue boy floating on piece of fence in floodwaters
item.description: A Florida boy floating in the flooded water in Tampa was rescued by sheriff's deputies on a patrol boat, authorities said Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: U.S. inflation reaches lowest point in three years
item.description: Although inflation may be the lowest in three years, the White House says the war on high prices is not over.
item.dc:creator: Reshad Hudson, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Rare comet visible in the night sky won't return for 80,000 years
item.description: Comet Tsuchinshan-ATLAS, also known as C/2023 A3 to scientists and pronounced Choo-cheen-shahn, is expected to be visible to the naked eye.
item.dc:creator: Sergio Robles, NewsNation

item.title: A former DEA agent is convicted of protecting drug traffickers
item.description: BUFFALO, N.Y. (AP) — A former U.S. Drug Enforcement Administration agent in Buffalo, New York, was convicted of corruption Thursday following a second trial on charges he used his position to protect drug traffickers he believed were associated with organized crime.
item.dc:creator: CAROLYN THOMPSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Biden tells Trump to 'get a life, man' and stop storm misinformation
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — President Joe Biden on Thursday publicly admonished Donald Trump, telling his predecessor to “get a life, man” and try to help people impacted by a pair of devastating hurricanes rather than spreading misinformation about the federal response.
item.dc:creator: JOSH BOAK and WILL WEISSERT, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Republican NY-18 candidate Alison Esposito says America doesn’t have a gun problem
item.description: “We have a heart problem in this country and a mental health problem in this country. We don’t have a gun problem in this country,” Esposito said.
item.dc:creator: Finn Hoogensen, NewsNation

item.title: VIDEO: Alligator seen attacking a tire in floodwaters after Hurricane Milton
item.description: A vehicle driving through Lee County was attacked by an alligator as it drove through watery roadways after storms hit the area.
item.dc:creator: Ashley Suter, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: What to know about Hurricane Milton after it slammed Florida's Gulf Coast
item.description: Florida residents and officials began assessing widespread damage Thursday after powerful Hurricane Milton brought strong winds, heavy rains and tornadoes as it moved toward the Gulf Coast and then barreled across the state. Gov.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Will we see northern lights, power grid impacts amid 'severe' geomagnetic storm?
item.description: Earth is being hit by a strong solar radiation storm event that will be followed by a geomagnetic storm, space weather officials say.
item.dc:creator: Addy Bink, NewsNation

item.title: 68-year-old man falls to death in Arches National Park
item.description: This death comes just days after a Utah man died while canyoneering in Zion National Park over the previous weekend.
item.dc:creator: Spencer Mahon, NewsNation

item.title: Matisyahu says he is voting for Trump
item.description: "I just feel that the Jews are like, under attack, and that the current administration really doesn't care," Matisyahu said.
item.dc:creator: Paula Froelich, NewsNation

item.title: Hurricane Milton’s winds topple crane that was building west Florida’s tallest residential tower
item.description: A construction crane came crashing down on the building that houses the Tampa Bay Times during the height of Hurricane Milton’s menace across Florida.
item.dc:creator: Jeffrey Collins, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Harris accepts invite to CNN town hall as another Trump debate appears unlikely
item.description: Vice President Harris has accepted an invitation from CNN to participate in a town hall on the network a week before Election Day, as it appears unlikely that former President Trump will agree to a second debate with her.
item.dc:creator: Dominick Mastrangelo, NewsNation

item.title: How to help the recovery from Milton, Helene
item.description: Nexstar, the parent company of this website, is teaming up to help support Red Cross efforts to offer critical resources after Milton.
item.dc:creator: Russell Falcon, KRON4

item.title: Texas mom, luxury real estate agent missing after party at exclusive private club, husband arrested
item.description: A neighbor told police he saw a Texas husband and wife arguing outside his window, and he heard screaming coming from a nearby wooded area before she vanished.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: 15 rescued from Florida home after Milton knocks tree on house
item.description: Officers with the Tampa Police Department were sheltering a few miles when they were alerted to the incident via a 911 call.
item.dc:creator: Juan Cisneros, NewsNation

item.title: Police rescue 15 people from Tampa home after Milton knocks tree on house
item.description: Officers with the Tampa Police Department were sheltering a few miles when they were alerted to the incident via a 911 call.
item.dc:creator: Juan Cisneros, KRON4

item.title: Road workers arrested after claiming cop attacked them
item.description: Contracted road workers say they are facing felony assault and kidnapping charges after claiming they were the ones assaulted by a mystery driver.
item.dc:creator: Chris Hayes, NewsNation

item.title: CNN's Anderson Cooper hit by flying object during Milton live shot
item.description: CNN’s Anderson Cooper was hit by a flying object on Wednesday during a live shot while reporting from Florida on Hurricane Milton.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Irwin, Fox 5

item.title: Milton and Helene leave students, schools reeling
item.description: As Hurricane Milton slams into Florida — and amid Helene's lingering destruction — students across the southeast are facing severe disruptions to their academic year, posing challenges for both educators and children after they have already witnessed devastation in their communities.
item.dc:creator: Lexi Lonas Cochran, KRON4

item.title: The Latest: Hurricane Milton weakens to Category 1, but danger remains in Florida
item.description: Hurricane Milton made landfall Wednesday along Florida’s Gulf Coast as a Category 3 storm, bringing powerful winds, deadly storm surge and potential flooding to much of the state. Milton drew fuel from exceedingly warm Gulf of Mexico waters, twice reaching Category 5 status.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Video: Hurricane Milton sucks water out of Tampa Bay
item.description: Tampa Bay experienced a rare reverse storm surge as Hurricane Milton made landfall Wednesday evening.
item.dc:creator: Nathaniel Rodriguez, Fox 5

item.title: Milton knocks out power to millions and spawns tornadoes across Florida. At least 5 dead
item.description: Florida residents are returning to the familiar ritual of assessing hurricane damage, the day after Milton smashed through many coastal communities and spawned a barrage of tornadoes that killed at least five people.
item.dc:creator: Terry Spencer And Kate Payne, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Video: Wind tears roof off Tropicana Field, home of the Rays
item.description: Hurricane Milton made landfall in Siesta Key south of St. Petersburg, and while the city avoided some of the worst storm surges that doesn't mean the city avoided major effects from the storm.
item.dc:creator: Garrett Phillips, KRON4

item.title: Watch: Massive 28-foot wave captured inside Hurricane Milton
item.description: Drone footage captured a monstrous wave inside Hurricane Milton as the powerful storm passed through the Gulf of Mexico on Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Sara Filips, Fox 5

item.title: Hurricane Milton slams Florida as a Category 3 storm; leaving millions in the dark
item.description: Hurricane Milton made landfall Wednesday along Florida’s Gulf Coast as a Category 3 storm, bringing powerful winds, deadly storm surge and potential flooding to much of the state. Milton drew fuel from exceedingly warm Gulf of Mexico waters, twice reaching Category 5 status.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: NASA video shows Hurricane Milton from space
item.description: Video taken from the International Space Station puts the massive size of Hurricane Milton into perspective.
item.dc:creator: Alix Martichoux, Fox 5

item.title: Hurricane Helene aftermath poses election hurdles in critical battlegrounds
item.description: Hurricane Helene has thrown up new hurdles for voters and election officials alike in Georgia and North Carolina, threatening disruptions to the voting process in two of the most critical battleground states.
item.dc:creator: Julia Mueller, WGN 9
